Appearances:
Plaintiff Bank of America N.A. is present. Represented by Kyle Vuong.
Attorney John H. Dresslar appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Geary Lee Brown is present.
Attorney Melvin Ceasar Belli representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-09-2012 remains on calendar.
